list.name: session
list.label: Session
list.query: SELECT session_uid FROM session GROUP BY session_uid ORDER BY MAX(time) DESC LIMIT 20

targets.rawSql:
WITH stint_data AS (
  SELECT sh.time, sh.latest_lap_time_ms, cs.visual_tyre_compound, cs.tyres_age_laps,
    LAG(cs.visual_tyre_compound) OVER (ORDER BY sh.time) AS prev_compound,
    LAG(cs.tyres_age_laps) OVER (ORDER BY sh.time) AS prev_age
  FROM session_history sh
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT visual_tyre_compound, tyres_age_laps FROM car_status
    WHERE session_uid='$session' AND car_index=$car_index AND visual_tyre_compound IS NOT NULL AND time <= sh.time
    ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
  ) cs ON true
  WHERE sh.session_uid='$session' AND sh.car_index=$car_index AND sh.latest_lap_time_ms > 0
),
stints AS (
  SELECT *,
    SUM(CASE WHEN prev_compound IS NULL OR visual_tyre_compound != prev_compound OR tyres_age_laps < prev_age THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
      OVER (ORDER BY time) AS stint_num
  FROM stint_data
)
SELECT stint_num AS "Stint", visual_tyre_compound AS "Compound",
  MIN(tyres_age_laps) AS "Start Age", MAX(tyres_age_laps) AS "End Age",
  COUNT(*) AS "Laps",
  MIN(latest_lap_time_ms) / 1000.0 AS "Best",
  AVG(latest_lap_time_ms) / 1000.0 AS "Avg"
FROM stints GROUP BY stint_num, visual_tyre_compound ORDER BY stint_num

WITH stint_data AS (
  SELECT sh.time, sh.latest_lap_time_ms, cs.visual_tyre_compound, cs.tyres_age_laps,
    LAG(cs.visual_tyre_compound) OVER (ORDER BY sh.time) AS prev_compound,
    LAG(cs.tyres_age_laps) OVER (ORDER BY sh.time) AS prev_age
  FROM session_history sh
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT visual_tyre_compound, tyres_age_laps FROM car_status
    WHERE session_uid='$session' AND car_index=$car_index AND visual_tyre_compound IS NOT NULL AND time <= sh.time
    ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
  ) cs ON true
  WHERE sh.session_uid='$session' AND sh.car_index=$car_index AND sh.latest_lap_time_ms > 0
),
stints AS (
  SELECT *,
    SUM(CASE WHEN prev_compound IS NULL OR visual_tyre_compound != prev_compound OR tyres_age_laps < prev_age THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
      OVER (ORDER BY time) AS stint_num
  FROM stint_data
)
SELECT tyres_age_laps AS "Tyre Age", latest_lap_time_ms / 1000.0 AS "Lap Time",
  stint_num || ' - ' || visual_tyre_compound AS "Stint"
FROM stints ORDER BY tyres_age_laps

WITH stint_data AS (
  SELECT sh.time, sh.latest_lap_time_ms, cs.visual_tyre_compound, cs.tyres_age_laps,
    LAG(cs.visual_tyre_compound) OVER (ORDER BY sh.time) AS prev_compound,
    LAG(cs.tyres_age_laps) OVER (ORDER BY sh.time) AS prev_age
  FROM session_history sh
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT visual_tyre_compound, tyres_age_laps FROM car_status
    WHERE session_uid='$session' AND car_index=$car_index AND visual_tyre_compound IS NOT NULL AND time <= sh.time
    ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
  ) cs ON true
  WHERE sh.session_uid='$session' AND sh.car_index=$car_index AND sh.latest_lap_time_ms > 0
),
stints AS (
  SELECT *,
    SUM(CASE WHEN prev_compound IS NULL OR visual_tyre_compound != prev_compound OR tyres_age_laps < prev_age THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
      OVER (ORDER BY time) AS stint_num
  FROM stint_data
),
first_lap AS (
  SELECT stint_num, MIN(latest_lap_time_ms) AS first_time
  FROM stints GROUP BY stint_num
)
SELECT s.tyres_age_laps AS "Tyre Age",
  (s.latest_lap_time_ms - fl.first_time) / 1000.0 AS "Delta from Stint Start (s)"
FROM stints s JOIN first_lap fl ON s.stint_num = fl.stint_num
ORDER BY s.tyres_age_laps

WITH lap_temps AS (
  SELECT ld.current_lap_num AS lap,
    AVG((ct.tyres_surface_temp_fl + ct.tyres_surface_temp_fr + ct.tyres_surface_temp_rl + ct.tyres_surface_temp_rr) / 4.0) AS avg_surf_temp
  FROM car_telemetry ct
  JOIN lap_data ld ON ld.session_uid = ct.session_uid AND ld.car_index = ct.car_index AND ld.frame_id = ct.frame_id
  WHERE ct.session_uid='$session' AND ct.car_index=$car_index AND ld.current_lap_num > 0
  GROUP BY ld.current_lap_num
)
SELECT lap AS "Lap", avg_surf_temp AS "Avg Surface Temp (°C)" FROM lap_temps ORDER BY lap

WITH lap_temps AS (
  SELECT ld.current_lap_num AS lap,
    AVG(ct.tyres_surface_temp_fl - ct.tyres_surface_temp_fr) AS front_spread,
    AVG(ct.tyres_surface_temp_rl - ct.tyres_surface_temp_rr) AS rear_spread
  FROM car_telemetry ct
  JOIN lap_data ld ON ld.session_uid = ct.session_uid AND ld.car_index = ct.car_index AND ld.frame_id = ct.frame_id
  WHERE ct.session_uid='$session' AND ct.car_index=$car_index AND ld.current_lap_num > 0
  GROUP BY ld.current_lap_num
)
SELECT lap AS "Lap", front_spread AS "Front L-R", rear_spread AS "Rear L-R" FROM lap_temps ORDER BY lap

WITH lap_temps AS (
  SELECT ld.current_lap_num AS lap,
    AVG((ct.tyres_inner_temp_fl + ct.tyres_inner_temp_fr + ct.tyres_inner_temp_rl + ct.tyres_inner_temp_rr) / 4.0
      - (ct.tyres_surface_temp_fl + ct.tyres_surface_temp_fr + ct.tyres_surface_temp_rl + ct.tyres_surface_temp_rr) / 4.0) AS inner_surface_delta
  FROM car_telemetry ct
  JOIN lap_data ld ON ld.session_uid = ct.session_uid AND ld.car_index = ct.car_index AND ld.frame_id = ct.frame_id
  WHERE ct.session_uid='$session' AND ct.car_index=$car_index AND ld.current_lap_num > 0
  GROUP BY ld.current_lap_num
)
SELECT lap AS "Lap", inner_surface_delta AS "Inner - Surface (°C)" FROM lap_temps ORDER BY lap

WITH stint_data AS (
  SELECT sh.time, sh.latest_lap_time_ms, cs.visual_tyre_compound, cs.tyres_age_laps,
    LAG(cs.visual_tyre_compound) OVER (ORDER BY sh.time) AS prev_compound,
    LAG(cs.tyres_age_laps) OVER (ORDER BY sh.time) AS prev_age
  FROM session_history sh
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT visual_tyre_compound, tyres_age_laps FROM car_status
    WHERE session_uid='$session' AND car_index=$car_index AND visual_tyre_compound IS NOT NULL AND time <= sh.time
    ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
  ) cs ON true
  WHERE sh.session_uid='$session' AND sh.car_index=$car_index AND sh.latest_lap_time_ms > 0
),
stints AS (
  SELECT *,
    SUM(CASE WHEN prev_compound IS NULL OR visual_tyre_compound != prev_compound OR tyres_age_laps < prev_age THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
      OVER (ORDER BY time) AS stint_num
  FROM stint_data
)
SELECT visual_tyre_compound AS "Compound", COUNT(*) AS "Laps",
  MIN(latest_lap_time_ms) / 1000.0 AS "Best",
  AVG(latest_lap_time_ms) / 1000.0 AS "Avg",
  STDDEV(latest_lap_time_ms) / 1000.0 AS "Std Dev"
FROM stints GROUP BY visual_tyre_compound ORDER BY "Best"

WITH stint_data AS (
  SELECT sh.time, sh.latest_lap_time_ms, sh.latest_lap_valid, cs.visual_tyre_compound, cs.tyres_age_laps,
    LAG(cs.visual_tyre_compound) OVER (ORDER BY sh.time) AS prev_compound,
    LAG(cs.tyres_age_laps) OVER (ORDER BY sh.time) AS prev_age
  FROM session_history sh
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT visual_tyre_compound, tyres_age_laps FROM car_status
    WHERE session_uid='$session' AND car_index=$car_index AND visual_tyre_compound IS NOT NULL AND time <= sh.time
    ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
  ) cs ON true
  WHERE sh.session_uid='$session' AND sh.car_index=$car_index AND sh.latest_lap_time_ms > 0
),
stints AS (
  SELECT *,
    SUM(CASE WHEN prev_compound IS NULL OR visual_tyre_compound != prev_compound OR tyres_age_laps < prev_age THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
      OVER (ORDER BY time) AS stint_num
  FROM stint_data
)
SELECT stint_num AS "Stint", visual_tyre_compound AS "Compound",
  COUNT(*) AS "Laps",
  ROUND(regr_slope(latest_lap_time_ms, tyres_age_laps)::numeric / 1000.0, 4) AS "Deg Rate (s/lap)"
FROM stints WHERE latest_lap_valid IS NOT FALSE
GROUP BY stint_num, visual_tyre_compound ORDER BY stint_num

WITH stint_data AS (
  SELECT sh.time, sh.latest_lap_time_ms, sh.latest_lap_valid, cs.visual_tyre_compound, cs.tyres_age_laps,
    cs.tyre_wear_fl, cs.tyre_wear_fr, cs.tyre_wear_rl, cs.tyre_wear_rr,
    LAG(cs.visual_tyre_compound) OVER (ORDER BY sh.time) AS prev_compound,
    LAG(cs.tyres_age_laps) OVER (ORDER BY sh.time) AS prev_age
  FROM session_history sh
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT visual_tyre_compound, tyres_age_laps, tyre_wear_fl, tyre_wear_fr, tyre_wear_rl, tyre_wear_rr FROM car_status
    WHERE session_uid='$session' AND car_index=$car_index AND visual_tyre_compound IS NOT NULL AND time <= sh.time
    ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
  ) cs ON true
  WHERE sh.session_uid='$session' AND sh.car_index=$car_index AND sh.latest_lap_time_ms > 0
),
stints AS (
  SELECT *,
    SUM(CASE WHEN prev_compound IS NULL OR visual_tyre_compound != prev_compound OR tyres_age_laps < prev_age THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
      OVER (ORDER BY time) AS stint_num
  FROM stint_data
)
SELECT stint_num AS "Stint", visual_tyre_compound AS "Compound",
  COUNT(*) AS "Laps",
  MIN(latest_lap_time_ms) / 1000.0 AS "Best",
  AVG(latest_lap_time_ms) / 1000.0 AS "Avg",
  ROUND(regr_slope(latest_lap_time_ms, tyres_age_laps)::numeric / 1000.0, 4) AS "Deg Rate",
  ROUND(MAX((tyre_wear_fl + tyre_wear_fr + tyre_wear_rl + tyre_wear_rr) / 4.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Max Avg Wear %"
FROM stints GROUP BY stint_num, visual_tyre_compound ORDER BY stint_num
